overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character leaving a neon-lit apartment, descending through graffiti-covered stairwells, and emerging onto a rainy cyberpunk city street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: standing by the window looking out at the rainy cityscape and Judy

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment with purple and blue neon lighting. Through a large window, a sprawling futuristic cityscape is visible with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. Judy Alvarez stands near the window looking out at the rain, and dialogue options appear suggesting an interaction moment.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment living room with curved sofa and neon vending machine

events.description: camera turns away from window and moves deeper into the apartment interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the apartment living area away from the window

entered.detail: curved leather sofa with items scattered on it
large blue graffiti-style mural on apartment wall
red neon-lit vending machine with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the window, the camera reveals more of the apartment interior featuring a curved leather couch, a vibrant blue wall mural, and a red neon vending machine. The space is bathed in purple and blue neon light, with various cyberpunk decor elements visible on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment kitchen and workshop area with tool bench

agents.ego_description: moving through kitchen area toward the apartment exit hallway

entered.detail: kitchen island with black countertop and yellow neon underlighting
cluttered workbench with tools, mechanical parts, and a desk lamp
doorway leading to building hallway and exit

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the kitchen and workshop area, featuring a sleek kitchen island with yellow neon accent lighting. A cluttered workbench with tools and mechanical equipment sits against the wall. The space transitions toward a doorway leading to the building's exit hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered stairwell with trash and fluorescent lighting

events.description: descending concrete stairs into lower apartment levels
lighting shifts to greenish fluorescent in the stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking down the apartment building stairwell with metal railings

entered.detail: concrete stairs with metal handrails descending between floors
walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
litter and debris scattered on stairwell floor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow stairwell with concrete steps and metal railings. The walls are covered in extensive colorful graffiti and tags. Fluorescent lights cast a greenish glow over the space, and trash is scattered on the floor. The camera descends steadily through this gritty interior passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower apartment hallway with graffiti leading to street exit

events.description: approaching exit door with green light leading to outside
door opens revealing bright neon city lights and rain outside

agents.ego_description: walking through hallway toward the street exit

notable_agents.action: person in green cap and shorts leaning against hallway wall

entered.detail: metal exit door with green light above leading to street

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the lower hallway, the camera passes a person leaning against the graffiti-covered wall. The corridor leads to an exit door marked with a green light. As the door approaches, the bright neon glow of the city and the rain become visible through the opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk city street with neon advertisements and traffic

events.description: exits building onto rainy cyberpunk city street
cars drive past on the wet street reflecting neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the rainy sidewalk in the cyberpunk city

notable_agents.action: van parked near the exit door
person walking on the sidewalk in the rain

entered.detail: rain-soaked asphalt street reflecting colorful neon lights
towering buildings covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon signs
traffic signals and street lights glowing in the rain
vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Stepping outside into the heavy rain, the scene opens onto a cyberpunk city street with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon lights from towering skyscrapers. Massive holographic advertisements cover the buildings. A van is parked near the exit, and sparse traffic moves along the road as the character walks into the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate, neon-lit sanctuary of a high-rise apartment into the gritty, rain-soaked expanse of a futuristic city. It begins by looking past Judy Alvarez through a large window at a sprawling cityscape before pulling back to reveal a living space bathed in purple and blue light, complete with a leather couch and a red neon vending machine. The camera then glides through a workshop area accented by yellow neon lighting, transitioning from the curated interior into a narrow, concrete stairwell where the mood shifts to a greenish fluorescent glow amidst colorful graffiti and scattered trash. As the camera descends and passes a figure leaning against the wall, the corridor opens toward an exit door that reveals the shimmering lights of the metropolis. Finally, the scene steps out into heavy rain, where the wet asphalt reflects the massive holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers of the city street.
